title: Tango Orange Soft Drink - 330 ml (Pack of 24)
features: BURST OF FRUITY FLAVOUR - The standout orange recipe you know and love
IT’S TIME TO TANGO - Try tango for a burst of tangy orange flavour and fizz
IDEAL REFRESHMENT - The ideal summer pick-me-up for people on the go; ideal served chilled
TANGO TOGETHER - The ideal partner for social occasions such as BBQs, picnics and parties
SUGAR-FREE OPTIONS AVAILABLE - Tango's sugar-free options are available in three flavours; orange, tropical or strawberry and watermelon
description: Product Description Tango orange soft drink is loved for its delicious orangey flavour. It contains less than 50 calories per 250 ml serving and is free of artificial colours and flavours. You know you’ve been Tangoed when you’ve just had a ridiculously refreshing experience. Now drink up...because it’s Time to Tango. Ingredients Ingredients: Carbonated Water, Orange Fruit from Concentrate (5%), Sugar, Acids (Citric Acid, Malic Acid), Natural Orange Flavouring, Acidity Regulator (Sodium Citrate), Sweeteners (Aspartame, Saccharin), Preservative (Potassium Sorbate), Antioxidant (Ascorbic Acid), Natural Colour (Carotenes). Safety Warning Contains Aspartame, May contain allergens Manufacturer Contact Information Britvic Soft Drinks Ltd., Hemel Hempstead, HP2 4TZ, UK. See more
